structure.name: Generic interest rates
structure.description: The "generic yield" is the yield on that bond, with maturity that is close to the chosen maturity point, for that date.

descriptions.en: The "generic yield" is the yield on that bond, with maturity that is close to the chosen maturity point, for that date.
descriptions.no: Generisk rente er den effektive renten på et statspapir som er nærmest den oppgitte løpetiden målt fra dagens dato.

series.name: Frequency
series.description: The time interval at which observations occur over a given time period.

series.name: Tenor
series.description: The amount of time left for the repayment of a loan or until a financial contract expires.

values.name: Government bonds
values.description: A bond is an interest-bearing security with an original maturity of more than 1 year.

observation.name: Time Period
observation.description: The period of time or point in time to which the measured observation refers.

dataset.name: Decimals
dataset.description: The number of digits to the right of a decimal point.
